allow: Bash(node -e "const{chromium}=require\('playwright'\);\(async\(\)=>{const b=await chromium.launch\(\);const p=await b.newPage\(\);const f='file:///'+process.cwd\(\).split\('\\\\\\\\'\).join\('/'\)+'/PDF.it-Guia-de-Marca.html';await p.goto\(f,{waitUntil:'networkidle'}\);await p.pdf\({path:'PDF.it-Guia-de-Marca.pdf',format:'Letter',printBackground:true,margin:{top:'0',right:'0',bottom:'0',left:'0'}}\);await b.close\(\);console.log\('PDF generated'\)}\)\(\)")
